description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, overhanging roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front includes a covered carport with a driveway leading up to the main entrance, while the rear showcases a spacious patio and a rectangular swimming pool with poolside loungers. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor areas. The exterior is finished with a combination of light-colored walls, wood paneling, and dark accent elements. The property is surrounded by a paved walkway and driveway, with minimal landscaping visible. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a carport, large windows, and a backyard pool, featuring clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, and main entrance under the overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the driveway extending to the carport.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
